success.description: Ƙungiyar injiniyoyin mu za ta duba bukatun ku kuma ta amsa cikin sa'o'i 24-48.

placeholders.detailedRequirements:
Da fatan za a bayar da cikakkun bayanai gami da:
- Bukatun fasaha da ma'auni
- Bayanin kayan aiki da adadi
- Bukatun aiki
- Yanayin muhalli
- Bukatun bin doka
- Duk wani la'akari na musamman...
placeholders.additionalRequirements: Duk wani ƙarin buƙatu, sharuɗɗa na musamman ko tambayoyi...

process.heading: Me ke faruwa biye da haka?

steps.followUpCall: Kiran shawarwari na biye da haka

placeholders.skills: Jera fasahar ku ta fasaha, ilimin software, harsunan shirye-shirye, takaddun shaida, da sauransu.
placeholders.coverLetter: Faɗa mana game da dalilai ku, burin aiki da yadda za ku iya taimakawa ƙungiyar mu...
